name: Sugarplum Black Forest Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the sugar, flour, baking soda, salt, baking powder, cocoa, margarine, buttermilk, and vanilla into a large mixing bowl.
2. Beat at low speed to blend ingredients together. Then beat for 2 minutes at medium speed.
3. Add eggs and beat for an additional 2 minutes until smooth.
4. Pour one-fourth of the batter into each of four greased and wax paper-lined 8-inch layer cake pans. The layers will be thin.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 15 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Two layers may stand while the first two bake if necessary.
6. Cool slightly, then remove from pans and continue cooling.
7. Fill and frost the layers with Sugarplum Chocolate Filling and Sugarplum Whipped Cream, alternating between them.
Sugarplum Chocolate Filling:
1. Combine chocolate and sifted powdered sugar in a bowl.
2. Add hot water and beat until smooth.
3. Add beaten egg and continue beating well.
4. Gradually add margarine, one tablespoon at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Stir in toasted sliced almonds, reserving some for garnish.
Sugarplum Whipped Cream:
1. Whip cream with granulated sugar and almond extract until stiff peaks form.
